description: Style NoteThese formal trousers from french connection will surprise you with their comfort, not to mention that this pair is a definite winner when it comes to style. Pair these trousers with a formal blazer and shirt with leather shoes for a dapper look that's sure to make a good impression. Product DetailsBlack formal trousers, has a double hook and button and zipped closure, two insert pockets in front, two welt pockets at the back and loops around the waist for a beltMaterial and care65% polyester and 35% rayonDry clean onlySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
